superseded_reason: Codex takeover integration on 2026-06-19 intentionally changed files outside this original child-executor owned_paths map; use final-acceptance-2026-06-19.json plus current validation commands as acceptance source of truth.

goal_chain.PROJECT_GOAL: 在 Claude Code 中建设 /gd Goal-Driven 多 Agent 主链路，提升复杂任务的计划、审查、执行、验收效率，并通过 Codex 作为 cross-review sidecar 降低填表式计划与执行遗漏风险。
goal_chain.CHAIN_GOAL: 用 shared core 固定目标链、SC、任务包、review contract 和 anti-fill 标准，保证后续 /gd command、multi-agent dispatch、execution review、Codex cross-review 都引用同一套契约。
goal_chain.PHASE_GOAL: 消除 GD 三档审查链路（L1/L2/L3）的 fail-open/放水缺陷，使失败/没审/未知态不再被当成通过，APPROVED 只在有真实证据时产生；同时收口 content-evidence/bridge 的误拒方向（SC-12/13）。

verify.cmd: 造 REQUIRES_CHANGES 的 mapped/raw 跑 python3 scripts/gd-codex-bridge-review.py parse-transport 断言进程 exit 1；辅 grep -nE 'return 0 if .*APPROVED.*else.*0' scripts/gd-codex-bridge-review.py 无命中
造 verdict=UNKNOWN 的 review 文本跑 python3 scripts/gd-validate-review-content-evidence.py --target <f>
造无 ### Finding 的 REQUIRES_CHANGES 文本跑同验证器；再带 --skip-line-ref-check + .json target
verify.expect: 无 Finding exit≠0；skip 开关对 REQUIRES_CHANGES/.json 拒绝 exit≠0

verify.cmd: 造 build_gate+not_run 的 outcome.json 跑 python3 scripts/gd-validate-execution-outcome.py --plan-file
verify.expect: 主动复跑或报应改 pass；schema 瑕疵时 stdout 含 PHASE2_SKIPPED

verify.cmd: 造引用缺文件名/SC-ID 但实质合法的审查(正例 fixture)跑 python3 scripts/gd-validate-review-content-evidence.py --target <f>
verify.expect: 不坍缩整审；该 finding 降级/精确标记，整体 verdict 保留，正例 exit 0

verify.cmd: 造 writer 输出 REQUIRES_CHANGES 跑 python3 scripts/gd-codex-bridge-review.py parse-transport
verify.expect: 映射为 REQUIRES_CHANGES，非 failed_to_run/transport 失败

verify.cmd: bash tests/gd-validator-hardening-smoke.sh：每个 V 验证器跑正负 fixture(空壳 anchor/假 hash/字符串 true/空 jobs/缺 jsonschema)
verify.expect: 合法输入 exit 0、绕过样本 exit 1；缺 jsonschema exit 2 或 stderr 告警

verify.cmd: 喂 timeout/解析失败桩调 merge-loop 的 bridge job 入口断言返回非空 FAILED(非 [])；两处 subprocess returncode 被检查；没改 finding 不判 resolved
verify.expect: 返回非空 FAILED；returncode 被检查；没改不 resolved

verify.cmd: python3 scripts/gd-review-router.py --self-test；造 decision=None/FAILED mapped 喂 live codex bridge 路径
verify.expect: self-test PASS；None/FAILED 不映射 completed/APPROVED；坏 descriptor 独立 failure_code

verify.cmd: 造 bridge_exit≠0 的 job + 缺 aggregate 跑 python3 scripts/gd-review-suite-controller.py(fixture 模式)
verify.expect: final_decision=FAILED；aggregate 失败 blocking；closure_eligible 缺失默认 False

verify.cmd: 造 bridge 超时跑 python3 scripts/gd-review-controller.py 断言输出 CONVERGENCE_TIMEOUT 不堆栈崩溃；造 git delta 失败断言注 diff_unavailable:true 不注假增量
verify.expect: CONVERGENCE_TIMEOUT 不崩；git fail 注 diff_unavailable:true

verify.cmd: bash tests/gd-transport-sweep-smoke.sh；只读盘模拟 writer 关键写失败；含空格路径跑 watch-state recent_failed_jobs；grep WRITER_PATH scripts/gd-codex-bridge-review.py 确认 active 解析到 vendor
verify.expect: sweep PASS；writer stdout 含 [REVIEW] ✗ FAILED；watch-state 不按空白错切；WRITER_PATH 指 vendor

verify.cmd: 造空 MANDATORY_READ 跑 python3 scripts/gd-validate-review2-output.py 断言 coverage gate fail；造 JSON 格式 raw_result_path 跑 python3 scripts/gd-audit-legacy-review-trust.py 断言归类 trusted_codex_raw
verify.expect: coverage gate fail(不失效)；audit 归类 trusted_codex_raw

waves.description: 建立 fail-closed pattern：step-1 共享 P0(bridge/content-evidence/execution-outcome) + step-3 L3 12 验证器硬化；owned_paths 不重叠，均 blocked_by 空。
step-2 L3 fail-open 收口(复用 step-1 pattern) + step-4 共享 controller+传输层；二者 blocked_by step-1，owned_paths 不重叠。
step-5 L2 + 收尾，单 step 独占 wave。

merge_gates.description: 每个 child executor 输出按 gd-execution-result 结构，主 agent 收集后写 wave batch JSON 并经 gd-validate-execution-batch.py 校验 exit 0。
post-wave owned_paths containment + physical existence 审计：deliverables_produced 全在本 track owned_paths 内且物理存在。
每 wave 写 stage-dispatch-ledger（child_agent_count≤2），全 wave 汇入 controller-report.batch_ledgers + suite_target_closure。
§8b 链路 smoke 回归修后全绿；任一 SC fail → final_decision 非 APPROVED。
